description: Battle sidebar: show total force instead of figure count, fix hostages modal display, and add season icons to header badge and log tabs
steps: In src/components/BattlePanel.tsx, in the combatants sections (both hotseat bidding UI and online mode), replace `{figures.length} {t('battle.figures')}` with the total force calculated by importing and calling `calculateForce(province, pid, gameState)` from src/utils/gameLogic.ts. Display as 'Fuerza: X' or use the i18n key.

In src/components/Icons.tsx, create 4 new season icon SVG components: SpringIcon (cherry blossom), SummerIcon (sun), AutumnIcon (maple leaf), WinterIcon (snowflake). Each takes size and color props following the IconProps interface pattern.

In src/components/GameBoard.tsx, add the appropriate season icon before the season name text in the .season-indicator div. Import the new season icons and render the matching one based on gameState.currentSeason. Use size=16 and color matching the dark text color used for the season badge text.

In src/components/GameLog.tsx, update the log season tabs to: (1) use the season color as background/border matching the header badge colors (spring=#FFB7C5, summer=#FF6B35, autumn=#D4A574, winter=#A8C8E8), and (2) include the season icon before the season name text in each tab button. Import the season icons from Icons.tsx.

In src/components/HostagesModal.tsx, replace the display of the raw alphanumeric clan name with: the BushiIcon (crossed swords) colored by the hostage's clan color, plus a ClanShield component showing the clan seal. Remove the `hostage-figure-type` span that shows the raw type string and instead show the swords icon prominently with the clan shield beside it.
Add any needed i18n keys to both src/i18n/en.ts and src/i18n/es.ts (e.g., 'battle.force' for force display).
acceptance_criteria: BattlePanel combatants section shows total force (using calculateForce) instead of figure count
Four season SVG icons (spring/summer/autumn/winter) exist in Icons.tsx
GameBoard header season badge shows the correct season icon before the season name
GameLog season tabs have colored backgrounds matching header badge colors and include season icons
HostagesModal shows BushiIcon (swords) in clan color + ClanShield seal instead of raw alphanumeric ID
TypeScript compiles without errors (npx tsc --noEmit passes)
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent && npx tsc --noEmit` and confirm zero errors
Run `cd /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent && npx vite build` and confirm successful build
